packages.name: pibo-run-control
packages.description: Expose pibo_run_* tools as one package for yielded native tools and subagents.

packages.name: web-annotation-agent-tools
packages.description: Expose session-scoped Web Annotation tools for listing, reading, watching, and lifecycle updates.

piboTools.name: browser-use
piboTools.description: Browser automation CLI for web interaction, screenshots, and extraction.
piboTools.snippet:
Browser automation CLI for frontend development and web testing.
Start in one persistent shell with `eval "$(npm run --silent dev -- tools env browser-use)"`.
For authenticated Pibo Chat Web App testing, prefer `eval "$(npm run --silent dev -- tools browser-use lease acquire --app pibo-chat --owner "$USER")"`.
Discover details with `npm run dev -- tools show browser-use` and `npm run dev -- tools guide browser-use browser-use`.

piboTools.name: ralph
piboTools.description: Pibo-native continuous agent job runner for implementation and debugging loops.
piboTools.snippet:
Continuous Pibo agent job runner for implementation/debug loops.
Use `pibo ralph templates`, then create with `pibo ralph add --template <id> --owner-scope <scope> --room <room-id> --start`.
Inspect/control with `pibo ralph list --json`, `runs --job <id> --json`, `stop <id>`, `cancel <id>`.
Guide: `pibo tools guide ralph ralph`.

ralphStopConditions.name: Max iterations
ralphStopConditions.description: Stops a Ralph job after its configured number of completed run attempts, regardless of outcome.

ralphStopConditions.name: Promise complete token
ralphStopConditions.description: Stops after a successful run whose final answer contains the promise-complete marker on its own line.

ralphStopConditions.name: Run fact count
ralphStopConditions.description: Stops when the current run or job history contains at least a configured number of matching Ralph run facts.

threshold.description: Stop after at least this many facts.

currentRunOnly.description: Only count facts for the current run.

actions.name: status
actions.description: Return current session status with context usage quota.

actions.name: compact
actions.description: Manually compact the session context.

actions.name: session_id
actions.description: Return the routed Pibo session id.

actions.name: clear_queue
actions.description: Clear queued messages that have not started yet.

actions.name: abort
actions.description: Abort the active Pi agent run.

actions.name: kill
actions.description: Kill the active agent run and all subagent sessions recursively.

actions.description: Kill the active agent run, all subagent sessions recursively, and all yielded runs.

actions.name: thinking
actions.description: Show or set the routed Pi thinking level.

actions.description: Toggle OpenAI priority service tier for fast-capable reasoning models.

actions.description: Return the active Pi session metadata for this routed session.

actions.name: session.list

actions.name: session.fork_candidates

actions.name: session.fork
actions.description: Fork before a selected user message and create a visible Pibo session for the fork.

actions.name: session.switch

actions.name: login
actions.description: Open the interactive provider login menu.

actions.description: Start an OAuth login flow for a provider. Returns a URL to open in a browser.
